# Spec — engineering handoff

## What to build

The readable, pannable canvas described in `03 Scope.md`, rendered from the single board model
(the schema's stage→artifact map). The pipeline is defined once; every surface renders from it.

## Acceptance

- The spine shows all eleven stages, including the skipped reframe, rendered honestly as "not run".
- Every artifact card is readable at 100% zoom — a real reading measure and type scale.
- The Decision Stream draws its supersede chains; the assumption graph draws its rests_on edges.

## Out of scope for this handoff

Prototype frames, comment/tweak/export, the design-system and component boards — staged for later
slices per the scope doc.
